message:
Running command: 
echo "=== Flow $(date) ==="
ps aux | grep -E "(librelane|openroad|magic|netgen)" | grep -v grep | awk '{print "PID:"$2,"CMD:"$11,"CPU:"$3"%","TIME:"$10}' | head -5
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_synth2.log 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^$"
echo ""
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -8
[ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no final"
